children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: A State is eligible to receive a requirements payment for a fiscal year if the chief executive officer of the State, or designee, in consultation and coordination with the chief State election official, has filed with the Commission a statement certifying that the State is in compliance with the requirements referred to in subsection (b). A State may meet the requirement of the previous sentence by filing with the Commission a statement which reads as follows: “______ hereby certifies that it is in compliance with the requirements referred to in section 253(b) of the Help America Vote Act of 2002.” (with the blank to be filled in with the name of the State involved).

children.heading: State plan requirement; certification of compliance with applicable laws and requirements
children.label: b State plan requirement; certification of compliance with applicable laws and requirements
A
children.text: contains each of the elements described in (or, for purposes of determining the eligibility of a State to receive a requirements payment appropriated pursuant to the authorization provided under , contains the element described in paragraph (14) of such section) with respect to the fiscal year;section 21004(a) of this titlesection 21007(a)(4) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: is developed in accordance with ; andsection 21005 of this title

children.label: C
children.text: meets the public notice and comment requirements of .section 21006 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: Subject to subparagraph (B), the State has filed with the Commission a plan for the implementation of the uniform, nondiscriminatory administrative complaint procedures required under (or has included such a plan in the State plan filed under paragraph (1)), and has such procedures in place for purposes of meeting the requirements of such section. If the State does not include such an implementation plan in the State plan filed under paragraph (1), the requirements of sections 21005(b) and 21006 of this title shall apply to the implementation plan in the same manner as such requirements apply to the State plan.section 21112 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: Subparagraph (A) shall not apply for purposes of determining the eligibility of a State to receive a requirements payment appropriated pursuant to the authorization provided under .section 21007(a)(4) of this title
The State is in compliance with each of the laws described in , as such laws apply with respect to this chapter.section 21145 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the State’s proposed uses of the requirements payment are not inconsistent with the requirements of subchapter III; and

children.label: B
children.text: the use of the funds under this paragraph is consistent with the requirements of .section 21001(b) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: Subject to subparagraph (B), the State has appropriated funds for carrying out the activities for which the requirements payment is made in an amount equal to 5 percent of the total amount to be spent for such activities (taking into account the requirements payment and the amount spent by the State) and, in the case of a State that uses a requirements payment as a reimbursement under , an additional amount equal to the amount of such reimbursement.section 21001(c)(2) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: Subparagraph (A) shall not apply for purposes of determining the eligibility of a State to receive a requirements payment appropriated pursuant to the authorization provided under for fiscal year 2010, except that if the State does not appropriate funds in accordance with subparagraph (A) prior to the last day of fiscal year 2011, the State shall repay to the Commission the requirements payment which is appropriated pursuant to such authorization.section 21007(a)(4) of this title

children.heading: Methods of compliance left to discretion of State
children.label: c Methods of compliance left to discretion of State
children.text: The specific choices on the methods of complying with the elements of a State plan shall be left to the discretion of the State.

children.heading: Timing for filing of certification
children.label: d Timing for filing of certification
children.text: A State may not file a statement of certification under subsection (a) until the expiration of the 45-day period (or, in the case of a fiscal year other than the first fiscal year for which a requirements payment is made to the State under this part, the 30-day period) which begins on the date notice of the State plan under this part is published in the Federal Register pursuant to .section 21005(b) of this title

children.heading: Chief State election official defined
children.label: e Chief State election official defined
children.text: In this part, the “chief State election official” of a State is the individual designated by the State under section 10 of the National Voter Registration Act of 1993 () [now ] to be responsible for coordination of the State’s responsibilities under such Act.42 U.S.C. 1973gg–852 U.S.C. 20509
